calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-04-2024 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-13-2024 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-23-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jay Roadarmel appeared by zoom for and with Stephen Wong by zoom.

The court informed the parties that it will use the date of death of July 24, 2023 that counsel selected. The court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. Stephen Kam Wong is appointed as the administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Status on close of estate is set for November 4, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. A petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is to be filed two weeks prior to the hearing date. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Bastain. Not reported.
